The '''''GS-138''''' was a [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] in the service of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]].

Its twelve-being crew were members of the [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] and/or [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|Alliance Special Operations]]; they were tasked with a top-secret mission in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. During the raid, it was ambushed and destroyed. Some survivors, including a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]], a male and a female [[Human/Legends|human]], managed to reach the [[Escape pod/Legends|life pods]] and floated among the ship's debris until they were rescued.

They were taken to the [[Mercy (hospital ship)|''Mercy'']] above [[Shackel]]. Three replacement [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tanks]] were pressed into service in order to accommodate them, and placed on a corridor outside [[ward 114]]. Medals, notes, drawings and snapshots were hanging or tapped on their tanks.<ref name="Dark Forces: Rebel Agent">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' {{Mo}}
